insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain a sense of accomplishment that will propel you forward. By focusing on building a daily habit of learning, even just 10-15 minutes a day, you can quickly turn your 0-day streak into a meaningful momentum that will help you make rapid progress and see noticeable improvements in your scores.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
